name: Autohome Inc.
description: Autohome Inc. is the leading online destination for automobile consumers in China. The company delivers comprehensive, independent, and interactive content to automobile consumers, and offers transaction services, lifestyle services, and other services for auto manufacturers and dealers. Through its websites and mobile applications, Autohome provides auto buyers with comprehensive and reliable information, enabling them to make informed purchasing decisions. It also serves as an important platform for automakers and dealers to conduct advertising campaigns and generate sales leads.
